name: Linda's Pumpkin Trifle
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Prepared crumbled unfrosted -spice cake, muffins or gingerbread
4 packages Instant butterscotch pudding (4 serving size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside 1/4 cup of cake crumbs for the top layer.
2. Divide the remaining cake crumbs into four portions. Sprinkle one portion into the bottom of a trifle bowl or 3-quart serving bowl.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine pumpkin, spices, milk, and pudding mix; stir until smooth.
4. Spoon half of this mixture into the serving bowl.
5. Sprinkle with a second portion of cake crumbs.
6. Whip cream until stiff and spoon half into the bowl.
7. Sprinkle with a third portion of cake crumbs.
8. Add the remaining pumpkin mixture, then the last portion of cake crumbs and the remaining whipped cream.
9. Sprinkle the reserved cake crumbs on top and around the edge of the bowl.
10. Place cherries in the center, if desired.
11. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
Yield: 12-15 servings
